name: Min Distance Between Selected Residues
description: Calculate the minimum distance between two sets of residues in a protein structure. For example, calculate the distance between an epitope and a binder.
capabilities: Calculate the minimum distance between two sets of residues in a protein structure
For example, calculate the distance between an epitope and a binder

structure.description: Protein structure file containing the residues to measure

residue_set_1.description: First set of residue IDs, comma-separated

residue_set_2.description: Second set of residue IDs, comma-separated
